roles.content: Continental philosophy: A comprehensive examination of continental philosophy within History of Philosophy, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
Critical perspectives on continental philosophy: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to continental philosophy.

roles.content: Recent developments in continental philosophy: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of continental philosophy in contemporary philosophy.
